# MuleSoft Tracing Module

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.2) of Tracing Module documentation.
> See [Tracing Module llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/tracing-module/llms-full.txt) for all the Tracing Module documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Tracing Module 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/tracing-module/latest/index.md)
- [Tracing Module Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/tracing-module/latest/tracing-module-examples.md)
- [Configure Tracing Module Logging Variable Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/tracing-module/latest/tracing-module-logging.md)
- [Tracing Module 1.2 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/tracing-module/latest/tracing-module-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Tracing Module 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/tracing-module/latest/tracing-module-studio-configuration.md)
- [Change the Correlation ID During Flow Execution with Tracing Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/tracing-module/latest/tracing-module-with-correlationid.md)
- [Tracing Module XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/tracing-module/latest/tracing-module-xml-maven.md)
